name: Veracode
description: Static Application Security Testing (SAST) and Dynamic Application Security Testing (DAST) platform for identifying security vulnerabilities in applications.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign in to the Veracode Platform at https://analysiscenter.veracode.com (Commercial), https://analysiscenter.veracode.eu (EU), or https://analysiscenter.veracode.us (US Federal)
2. From the user account dropdown, select API Credentials
3. Click Create API Credentials and choose HMAC credentials
4. Copy the API ID and API Key
5. Select your region and paste the credentials below

credentialFields.label: API ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Veracode HMAC API ID. Found at Veracode Platform > API Credentials.

credentialFields.label: API Key (Secret)
credentialFields.helpText: Your Veracode HMAC API Key. Found at Veracode Platform > API Credentials.

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Veracode region. Check with your administrator if unsure.

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Monitors application scans for security vulnerabilities and findings

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that applications are being scanned and monitored for security vulnerabilities
